items.curatedReasonEn: Evidence for short-term motor function improvement with rTMS in Parkinson's disease is growing, but long-term efficacy and optimal parameters remain unclear. Consider it an adjunctive therapy, not a standalone solution.
items.limitation: 该Meta分析未能明确报告不同刺激参数对长期效应的影响，且纳入研究间的异质性可能影响结果外推。
items.limitationEn: This meta-analysis did not clearly report the impact of different stimulation parameters on long-term effects, and heterogeneity among included studies may affect generalizability.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review on hamstring injury return to play (RTP) found a high recurrence rate of 57% within the first month and identified a lack of clear consensus on weighted RTP criteria.
items.curatedReason: 膕绳肌损伤重返运动（RTP）仍缺乏明确、标准化的加权标准。在制定RTP计划时，你需要综合考虑现有证据，别过度依赖单一指标。
items.titleZh: 膕绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准建立：一项系统综述和方法学质量分析
items.summaryZh: 一项关于膕绳肌损伤重返运动（RTP）的系统综述发现，首月内复发率高达57%，并指出在加权RTP标准上缺乏明确共识。
items.curatedReasonEn: There is still a lack of clear, standardized weighted criteria for return to play (RTP) after hamstring injury. When developing RTP plans, you need to integrate existing evidence and not over-rely on a single metric.
items.limitation: 系统综述指出现有研究在RTP标准上缺乏共识，且方法学质量分析未详述纳入研究的具体局限。
items.limitationEn: The systematic review noted a lack of consensus in existing research on RTP criteria, and the methodological quality analysis did not elaborate on specific limitations of the included studies.

items.title: Effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension: a network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials
items.summary: A network meta-analysis of 31 RCTs (n=1345) compared the effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension, finding combined training effective.
items.curatedReason: 这项网络Meta分析明确了不同运动训练模式对高血压患者24小时动态血压的影响。在为高血压患者制定运动处方时，你可以依据研究结果，优先考虑联合训练，以期获得更佳的血压控制效果。
items.titleZh: 不同运动训练模式对高血压成人24小时动态血压的影响：一项随机对照试验的网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含31项随机对照试验（n=1345）的网络Meta分析比较了不同运动训练模式对高血压成人24小时动态血压的影响，发现联合训练是有效的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This network meta-analysis clarifies the effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension. When prescribing exercise for hypertensive patients, you can prioritize combined training based on these findings to achieve better blood pressure control.
items.limitation: 网络Meta分析的结论可能受到纳入研究数量和质量的影响，且血压测量方式的标准化程度可能存在差异。
items.limitationEn: The conclusions of the network meta-analysis may be affected by the number and quality of included studies, and there may be variations in the standardization of blood pressure measurement methods.

items.title: Dose-response interplay between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity on all-cause mortality risk: a causal inference analysis
items.summary: A causal inference analysis (n=71,715) using UK Biobank data estimated the dose-response effects of light-intensity physical activity (LPA) on all-cause mortality across different levels of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity (MVPA).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究深入分析了轻度与中高强度体力活动对全因死亡风险的剂量反应关系。你可以利用这些信息，更精确地为患者制定个性化的活动建议，特别是针对那些难以达到高强度运动量的人群。
items.titleZh: 轻度与中高强度体力活动对全因死亡风险的剂量反应相互作用：一项因果推断分析
items.summaryZh: 一项使用英国生物样本库数据（n=71,715）进行的因果推断分析，评估了轻度体力活动（LPA）与中高强度体力活动（MVPA）不同水平下，LPA对全因死亡率的剂量反应效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study delves into the dose-response relationship between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity and all-cause mortality risk. You can use this information to more precisely tailor individualized activity recommendations for patients, especially for those who struggle to achieve high-intensity exercise levels.
items.limitation: 研究依赖加速度计数据，可能无法完全捕捉所有类型的体力活动，且英国生物样本库人群的代表性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study relies on accelerometer data, which may not fully capture all types of physical activity, and the representativeness of the UK Biobank population may be limited.

items.title: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This RCT evaluated the impact of perioperative respiratory muscle training on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, functional capacity, and prognostic outcomes in elderly patients undergoing cardiac surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能和功能能力有显著益处。你应将呼吸肌训练纳入老年心脏手术患者的康复方案，以优化预后。
items.titleZh: 围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验旨在评估围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能、功能能力和预后结局的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial demonstrates significant benefits of perioperative respiratory muscle training on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, and functional capacity in elderly cardiac surgery patients. You should incorporate respiratory muscle training into rehabilitation protocols for elderly cardiac surgery patients to optimize outcomes.
items.limitation: 试验的具体样本量和效应量在摘要中未明确给出，限制了对其强度和普适性的初步判断。
items.limitationEn: The specific sample size and effect size of the trial were not explicitly stated in the abstract, limiting initial assessment of its strength and generalizability.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Promoting Client-Centered Communication in Rehabilitation: Strategies for Managing Difficult Conversations
items.summary: This article outlines strategies for rehabilitation clinicians to manage difficult conversations, emphasizing client-centered communication to foster strong client-clinician relationships and improve outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 在康复实践中，有效管理困难对话对建立以患者为中心的合作关系至关重要。本文提供了具体策略，帮助你提升沟通技巧，避免潜在的冲突并改善患者依从性。
items.titleZh: 促进康复中的以患者为中心沟通：管理困难对话的策略
items.summaryZh: 本文概述了康复临床医生管理困难对话的策略，强调以患者为中心的沟通，以促进患者与临床医生之间的良好关系并改善预后。
items.curatedReasonEn: In rehabilitation practice, effectively managing difficult conversations is crucial for building client-centered, collaborative relationships. This article provides specific strategies to help you improve communication skills, avoid potential conflicts, and enhance patient adherence.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Preventing sudden cardiac death among football athletes in Cameroon: 22-year follow-up to the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe - supported by the BJSM Global Research Grant Programme
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (n=211) surveyed Cameroonian football clubs on cardiovascular screening and emergency response planning for sudden cardiac death (SCD) prevention, 22 years after Marc-Vivien Foe's death.
items.curatedReason: 这项喀麦隆足球运动员心脏骤停预防策略的追踪研究，揭示了全球体育运动中心脏筛查和应急响应的现状，对你思考本地体育赛事安全保障有借鉴意义。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆足球运动员猝死预防：Marc-Vivien Foe悲剧性死亡22年后的追踪研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究（n=211）调查了喀麦隆足球俱乐部在马克-维维安·福伊（Marc-Vivien Foe）逝世22年后，关于心血管筛查和猝死（SCD）应急响应计划的现状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This follow-up study on sudden cardiac death prevention strategies for Cameroonian football athletes sheds light on the current state of cardiac screening and emergency response in global sports, offering insights for local sports safety protocols.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面调查研究，无法建立因果关系，且结果可能受参与者回忆偏倚影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey study, which cannot establish causality, and results may be subject to participant recall bias.

items.title: Inflammation and alterations in redox homeostasis precede and persist following musculoskeletal injury in US army trainees
items.summary: A prospective observational study (n=206) in US Army trainees found that systemic inflammation and redox homeostasis alterations precede and persist following musculoskeletal injury (MSKI), associating with MSKI occurrence.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究揭示了炎症和氧化应激生物标志物与美国陆军训练中肌肉骨骼损伤的关联性。你应意识到这些生物标志物可能预示损伤风险，但目前证据不足以指导具体干预。
items.titleZh: 炎症和氧化应激改变先于肌肉骨骼损伤并持续存在于美国陆军受训者中
items.summaryZh: 一项针对206名美国陆军受训者的前瞻性观察研究发现，全身炎症和氧化还原稳态改变在肌肉骨骼损伤（MSKI）发生之前出现并持续存在，与MSKI的发生相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study reveals the association between inflammatory and oxidative stress biomarkers and musculoskeletal injuries during US Army training. You should be aware that these biomarkers may indicate injury risk, but current evidence is insufficient to guide specific interventions.
items.limitation: 这是一项观察性研究，只能提示关联性，不能建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, which can only suggest associations, not establish causality.

items.title: Fitness under fire: a sports and exercise medicine framework to maintain fitness in the context of modern global conflict, enforced confinement and possible radiation exposure
items.summary: This editorial proposes a sports and exercise medicine framework to maintain fitness and optimize well-being amidst modern global conflicts, enforced confinement, and potential radiation exposure.
items.curatedReason: 在面对全球冲突、强制禁闭和辐射暴露等极端条件下，如何维持体能是一项重大挑战。这份运动医学框架为你提供了在该背景下优化健康的思考方向。
items.titleZh: 战火下的体能：应对现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和潜在辐射暴露的运动与锻炼医学框架
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论提出了一个运动与锻炼医学框架，旨在现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和潜在辐射暴露背景下，维持体能并优化身心健康。
items.curatedReasonEn: Maintaining fitness under extreme conditions like global conflict, enforced confinement, and radiation exposure is a major challenge. This sports and exercise medicine framework offers guidance on optimizing well-being in such contexts.
